metadata.description: Download videos from 1800+ platforms and generate AI summaries with complete resource packages

plugins.name: video-summarizer
plugins.description: Download videos from YouTube, Bilibili, Twitter/X, TikTok and 1800+ platforms. Outputs video (MP4), audio (MP3), subtitles (VTT with timestamps), transcript (TXT), and AI-powered summary (MD). Auto-installs dependencies (yt-dlp, ffmpeg, faster-whisper).
